description: Core engine: change worktree off operating/, balls stages base change, pre/post phase runner (skeleton, no real plugins yet), SEAL = commit+integrate atomic (the pre/post boundary), teardown. §14 reverse-order rollback, three side-effect tiers, core tier-1 un-seal (discard worktree / git reset terminus). No-diff ops skip the seal.
title: §8 op lifecycle (change-worktree + seal) + §14 rollback
